Publications

Selected papers and research highlights

This page lists selected publications. The list can be updated by editing _data/publications.yml.

2026 · Applied Catalysis B: Environment and Energy · Highlight

Yoon Lab and collaborators · Article

2025 · Advanced Functional Materials · Highlight

Yoon Lab and collaborators · Article

2025 · Surfaces and Interfaces

In situ HKUST-1 coating on polymer separators for enhanced thermal and interfacial stability in lithium metal batteries

Yoon Lab and collaborators · Article

2025 · Chemical Engineering Journal · Highlight

Yoon Lab and collaborators · Article

2023 · Advanced Energy Materials · Highlight
